texto: What I would like to say to you in conclusion is this: romance is the dessert. If you are hungry, you need to be working on the main meal - yourself. That means learning how to fulfill yourself first, and once you have achieved that, then you will be ready for dessert!" - Raeleen
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Belinda Jones: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a amor. O trecho “What I would like to say to you in conclusion is this: romance is the dessert. If you are hungry,…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que amor, life-lesson, love pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de trabalho e love.

texto: The research on male-female attraction tells us that in reality neither males nor females thinks that physical attraction a turn-on. It's the slightly tousled hair, imperceptibly loosened tie, the little flaws that attract someone because we perceive them as human and thus like ourselves

O trecho “The research on male-female attraction tells us that in reality neither males nor females thinks …” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, life-lesson, love pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de love.
